recommendations.title: Enhance ESG Risk Disclosure in BRSR FY26 Filing
recommendations.description: Adani Power should proactively enhance its ESG risk disclosures in the upcoming BRSR FY26 filing to mitigate SEBI scrutiny and avoid trading restrictions that could increase cost of capital by 20-40 bps.
recommendations.profitability_link: Avoiding a 30 bps increase in cost of capital on ₹30,000 Cr debt saves approximately ₹90 Cr annually
recommendations.peer_benchmark: Competitors like NTPC have enhanced ESG disclosures to maintain credit ratings and investor confidence

recommendations.title: Strengthen Enterprise Risk Management Framework
recommendations.description: Implement COSO ERM best practices to improve risk oversight and maturity, thereby supporting credit rating stability and reducing cost of capital pressures.
recommendations.profitability_link: A 15 bps reduction in cost of capital on ₹30,000 Cr debt equals ₹45 Cr annual savings
recommendations.peer_benchmark: Adani Power should match or exceed Tata Power's ERM maturity improvements that helped maintain their credit ratings

recommendations.title: Develop ESG Narrative for Differentiation
recommendations.description: Craft and communicate a proactive ESG narrative focusing on risk management and sustainability to differentiate from peers and attract FII inflows.
recommendations.profitability_link: Reducing FII outflow and P/E compression by 5% can preserve ₹2,500 Cr in market valuation
recommendations.peer_benchmark: Adani Green Energy's strong ESG narrative has attracted premium valuations

recommendations.title: Integrate ESG Factors into Financial Valuation Models
recommendations.description: Incorporate ESG risks and opportunities into DCF and multiples valuation models to better reflect cost of capital changes and improve investor communication.
recommendations.profitability_link: Mitigating a 5% P/E compression on ₹50,000 Cr market cap preserves ₹2,500 Cr in valuation
recommendations.peer_benchmark: JSW Energy has integrated ESG into valuations, resulting in better investor sentiment

immediate_high.title: Enhance ESG Risk Disclosure in BRSR FY26 Filing

immediate_low.title: Integrate ESG Factors into Financial Valuation Models
